name: Viral Trend Commentary
description: React to a trending topic with a strong stat, your perspective, and a CTA. High dwell time and comment potential.

variables.name: hook
variables.description: Attention-grabbing opener in first 210 chars (before 'see more'). Use stats, contrast, or a bold statement.

variables.name: trend_context
variables.description: What trend/news are you reacting to? 1-2 sentences.

variables.name: stat_or_data
variables.description: A specific number, stat, or data point that backs your perspective.

variables.name: your_take
variables.description: Your unique insight or opinion on this trend. What does everyone miss?

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Engagement question. E.g. 'What do you think?', 'Had a similar experience?'

tips: Post within 24h of the trend breaking — timing is key
Keep text 1300-1600 chars for best engagement
Never put links in the post body — add in comment after 15 min
Be available in the golden hour (first 60 min) to reply to comments
